summary: First iteration. Tested CallCenter PBX Manager (FusionCC) backend (12 pytest cases) and frontend (login, full sidebar nav, recordings playback, logout). All 12 backend tests pass; all critical frontend flows work end-to-end.

issues: Recharts console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Charts still render visually but ResponsiveContainer parent appears to briefly have 0 dimensions on initial mount. Consider setting minHeight on chart container to silence warning.

action_items: (Optional) Fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer warning by giving chart wrapper an explicit min-height (e.g. h-72) so initial render doesn't compute -1 dimensions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `/api/realtime/calls` synthesizes random caller numbers and elapsed_sec on every call - state is not stable between polls. Acceptable for mock but document it.
server.py: `seed_data` is invoked on startup and is idempotent for users (good) but for queues/agents/calls only checks count==0 - if you partially seed in dev you'll never re-seed. Minor.

server.py: CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; works here because CORS_ORIGINS='*' is explicit but browsers will still ignore credentials with wildcard. For production set explicit origin list.
server.py: JWT_SECRET stored in .env - fine for demo; ensure rotated for prod.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook hint suggested 5-fail lockout). Not implemented; consider adding for production.
Frontend: Recharts container -1 warnings indicate ResponsiveContainer used without parent height in some screens.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, 6 nav routes, recordings audio player, logout all OK)

test_credentials: admin@callcenter.com/admin123 (used). supervisor@callcenter.com/super123 and agent@callcenter.com/agent123 also seeded.
seed_data_creation: None created by tests. Backend seeds 3 users, 4 queues, 8 agents, 80 calls, ~56 recordings on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_callcenter_api.py - reuse for regression. All endpoints under /api prefix and require Bearer token (or httpOnly cookie). Recordings audio_url is mocked to https://www.soundhelix.com/examples/mp3/SoundHelix-Song-1.mp3. Frontend uses data-testid extensively: login-email/password/submit, nav-{dashboard|realtime|recordings|reports|queues|agents}, btn-logout, rec-play-{id}, audio-player. No brute-force lockout implemented; auth playbook lockout-after-5-fails not present.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Only a non-blocking Recharts width=-1 console warning observed on Dashboard/Reports load; charts still render correctly after layout settles.
